【温馨提醒】重生者周一凡会带你再次经历1999～2025年的重大事件，无论你什么年龄，是否经历过以往25年发生的事情，他都会让你亲临其境。

【故事内容】商业巨鳄周一凡重生回到1999年，他当时只是高三学生，意识空间里有一部仅剩5%电量的未来手机。他每查看一条未来“剧透”短信需消耗相对应的电量，唯有弥补前世对家人的亏欠和人生的遗憾，获得“情感回馈”才能充电。他必须在电量耗尽前，利用重生者的预知和改变重大事件的机会，在商战中通过极限操作积累资本，拯救家破人亡的悲剧，并与同样拥有未来信息的神秘组织“魅影”展开跨时空博弈。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/31d1eb80a3dad5ce0a4994c5828bb6c8~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"魚之书","author_id":"","book_id":"7585605572469214232","book_name":"重生带着一亿现金回到高中时代","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283858","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5982人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":20,"name":"神豪","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=20&name=神豪&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7585606569472033304","read_count":"5982","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"597107"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"300","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,神豪,重生,系统","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/31d1eb80a3dad5ce0a4994c5828bb6c8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779312433&x-signature=DzfUJw20h4XgcchB3c9JsYAKQFk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1848752542341931","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"170"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322052712E5F77F08FA51D6419CA7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},
